title: Color Token Naming Convention
content: All three Powerhouse brand design systems (Achra, Vetra, Powerhouse) use a consistent CSS custom property naming convention for color tokens. The pattern is: --name for the base color, --name-foreground for the contrasting text color suitable for use on that surface, and --name-30 for a 30% opacity variant (using rgba). For example, --primary: #7A3AFF, --primary-foreground: #F3F5F7, --primary-30: rgba(122, 58, 255, 0.3). The :root selector defines light theme values (the default), while .dark class or [data-theme="dark"] attribute selectors define dark theme overrides. Additional opacity variants exist at 50 and 70 levels for foreground colors (e.g., --foreground-70, --foreground-50). This convention is documented in CLAUDE.md and implemented across all colors.css files in the repository at https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems.
description: All Powerhouse brands use CSS custom properties following --name, --name-foreground, and --name-30 opacity variant patterns.
